summary: Stellar audience capture with a majestic Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain transition; rock‑solid performance from both sets.
review: The audience recording is praised as rich, deep and plush – essentially an excellent capture of the live ambience. Musically the show is described as solid throughout, highlighted by an “absolutely majestic” Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain segue and a strong first‑and‑second‑set flow. Brent’s debut on keyboards receives a nod as well.

ai_rating.rationale: Review emphasizes superb audience recording quality and a rock‑solid show with standout Scarlet>Fire, yielding a high combined score; only one detailed review limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as stellar, rich, deep and plush; no issues noted, clear ambience captured.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Both sets are called rock‑solid with especially praised transitions, notably the Scarlet>Fire segue.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent's very first show is noted as impressive for the new keyboardist.
